description: A vertical graphic on a light gray background with a faint Department of Homeland Security seal. Blue text at the top reads Green cards and visas will be revoked if an alien breaks the law. Below are images of a sample United States Permanent Resident card and an immigrant visa page, both marked with a large red REVOKED stamp; the sample documents use placeholder names such as SPECIMEN and HAPPYPERSON.
notable_text: Green cards and visas will be revoked if an alien breaks the law.; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA PERMANENT RESIDENT; REVOKED; IMMIGRANT VISA
